name: Vector.co

auth.notes: Vector MCP uses https://mcp.vector.co/mcp with browser-based OAuth 2.0; no API key, CLI, or local install is required.

rateLimits: No public Vector MCP rate-limit numbers found; Vector says it caches performance data and refreshes daily to avoid hammering ad-platform APIs.
pagination: No public pagination docs found for the MCP tools.
notes: Vector is agent-ready through an official remote MCP server and official setup/use/guardrail docs.
The MCP is currently read-only and focuses on ad performance, campaign pacing, creative diagnostics, and de-anonymized visitor/buyer activity.
Vector states it uses approved ad-platform APIs, avoids browser automation/scraping, and caches data with daily refreshes.
